channel.title: Ses on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Ses on Arrans github.io

item.title: kurrier-org/kurrier
item.description: Kurrier is a modern, self-hosted webmail that integrates with all the major ESP’s.

item.title: markushinz/aws-ses-pop3-server
item.description: The missing POP3 💌 server for Amazon Simple Email Service - written in golang.
